name: ChartMogul
description: Monitor ChartMogul revenue analytics for subscription data access and compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to ChartMogul at https://app.chartmogul.com
2. Go to Profile → View API Key
3. Copy your API key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in ChartMogul Profile → View API Key

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies ChartMogul data sources are connected for revenue analytics

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews ChartMogul users with access to revenue analytics
